title: The ⊢ symbol is the formal mark of logical derivation: 'A ⊢ B' means the definition proves the outcome. Precept's .precept file is exactly this — the complete definition from which every valid state configuration is structurally derived. Invalid states are not refused; they cannot be derived, so they do not exist.
conceptualBridge: The entailment mark means Precept's definition derives all valid states because the symbol ⊢ literally means 'proves' — the contract is the source and every valid configuration follows from it with logical necessity.
decision: Kept: the ⊢ symbol is a new visual family (logical/symbolic) with a genuine mathematical connection to Precept's derivation guarantee; passes threshold at 4.19 avg.
